allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if ''''proxy'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''Proxy'''' in k}\)")
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'mkdir -p /etc/docker && echo ""{}"" > /etc/docker/daemon.json && kill -HUP $\(pgrep dockerd\)')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'nslookup http.docker.internal 2>&1; nslookup hubproxy.docker.internal 2>&1')

Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'kill -9 $\(pgrep dockerd\) 2>&1; sleep 2; NO_PROXY=* HTTPS_PROXY="""""""" HTTP_PROXY="""""""" http_proxy="""""""" https_proxy="""""""" no_proxy=""""*"""" /usr/local/bin/dockerd --config-file /run/config/docker/daemon.json --containerd /run/containerd/containerd.sock --pidfile /run/desktop/docker.pid --swarm-default-advertise-addr=192.168.65.3 --host-gateway-ip 192.168.65.254 &')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process ''Docker Desktop'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 2; Start-Process ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe''")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe''; Write-Host ''Docker Desktop launched''")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 9308 -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match ''Docker|docker|com\\.docker'' } | Select-Object Name,Id")
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'DPID=$\(pgrep dockerd\); ls /proc/$DPID/root/run/config/docker/ 2>&1; cat /proc/$DPID/root/run/config/docker/daemon.json 2>&1')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'which python3 python tinyproxy squid socat ncat nc wget curl 2>/dev/null; uname -m')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'which python3; ip addr show eth0 | grep ""inet "" | awk ""{print \\$2}""')
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cat /tmp/proxy.log; ps aux | grep proxy")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "nohup python3 /tmp/proxy.py > /tmp/proxy.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 2; cat /tmp/proxy.log; ss -tlnp | grep 3128")
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c "echo ''172.19.31.157 http.docker.internal hubproxy.docker.internal'' >> /etc/hosts && cat /etc/hosts | grep docker.internal")

Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'DPID=$\(pgrep dockerd\); nsenter -t $DPID -m -u -i -n -p -- sh -c ""echo \\""172.19.31.157 http.docker.internal hubproxy.docker.internal\\"" >> /etc/hosts && grep docker.internal /etc/hosts""')

Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'DPID=$\(pgrep dockerd\); echo ""dockerd PID: $DPID""; nsenter --target $DPID --mount --uts --ipc --net --pid -- sh -c ""echo \\""172.19.31.157 http.docker.internal hubproxy.docker.internal\\"" >> /etc/hosts && grep docker.internal /etc/hosts""')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'ps aux | grep dockerd | grep -v grep; pgrep -x dockerd; pgrep dockerd')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'nsenter --target 171 --mount -- sh -c ""echo \\""172.19.31.157 http.docker.internal hubproxy.docker.internal\\"" >> /etc/hosts && grep docker.internal /etc/hosts""')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'nsenter --target 171 --mount -- sh -c ""printf \\""\\n172.19.31.157 http.docker.internal hubproxy.docker.internal\\n\\"" >> /etc/hosts && tail -3 /etc/hosts""')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'nsenter --target 171 --net -- sh -c ""ip route; echo ---; ip addr; echo ---; nc -zv 172.19.16.1 3128 2>&1""')
Bash(wsl -d docker-desktop sh -c 'ip addr; echo ---; nc -zv 192.168.65.7 3128 2>&1; nc -zv 192.168.65.1 80 2>&1')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match ''Docker|docker|com\\.docker'' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 3; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match ''Docker|docker|com\\.docker'' } | Select-Object Name,Id")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/jobposting -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"Senior .NET Developer","jobDescription":"We are looking for a skilled .NET developer with microservices experience.","companyName":"TechCorp AB","jobLocation":"Stockholm","salary":75000,"isRemote":false,"isFullTime":true,"contactEmail":"jobs@techcorp.com","postDate":"2026-04-08T00:00:00","expiryDate":"2026-05-08T00:00:00","jobCategory":"Information Technology"}')
